orgPolicy.title: Project Orbit — Schedule Your First Coaching Session by EOD Today
orgPolicy.summary: Teresa and Kebone launched Project Orbit, a structured recruiter coaching program. PEs must reach out to their assigned recruiter(s) by EOD Monday (July 20) and schedule a session before Q1 closes (July 30).
bullets: ACTION: Reach out to your assigned recruiter TODAY — check the Orbit Pairings spreadsheet for your pairing
Complete first sessions before end of Q1 (July 30); 45-minute sessions recommended
Review the PE Coaching Guide in Notion before your first session (Open → Explore → Commit arc)
Complete post-session documentation within 30 minutes while it's fresh
Questions? Reach out to Teresa Waggoner or Kebone Moloko

tp.point: Project Orbit first coaching sessions need to be scheduled by EOD today (Monday July 20). Reach out to your assigned recruiter and get time on the calendar. Sessions must be completed before July 30.

orgPolicy.title: Candidate Fraud Management — Automation in Development
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech, Invite Ops, Security, and Engineering are building automation to label and manage candidates in Greenhouse by fraud risk tier. Recruiters will be notified when actions are taken on their candidates.
bullets: Multiple teams collaborating: PeopleTech, Invite Ops, Security, Engineering
Candidates will be labeled and managed across different risk tiers automatically in Greenhouse
Recruiters will be notified when actions are taken on their candidates
Training resources and more details will be shared before formal rollout — no action needed yet

tp.point: A candidate fraud management automation is being built. Recruiters will receive notifications when actions are taken on their candidates. Training resources coming before rollout — no process changes yet.

items.heading: Orbit Coaching Cadence Clarified
bullets: First sessions must be completed before end of Q1 (July 30)
Q2: may keep same pairing or switch — leadership team will decide mid-Q2
45-minute sessions recommended; 30 min OK if a follow-up is scheduled
PE Coaching Guide access: request via Teresa if you don't have it yet
items.source: #invite-pes thread, Teresa Waggoner & Kristin Ruehle, July 20

items.heading: Invite Leadership Onsite Wrapped
bullets: The Invite PE leadership team completed their Denver onsite last week
Kristin: "Incredibly impressed and thankful for how you all showed up. You were prepared, engaged and inspiring."
Team photo shared drive created by Michelle Cordray — drop your photos in
